CustomField.description: FTE posts - No. of business, public service, engineering & technology associate professionals (SOC Codes 31-35)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Of these FTE posts, how many are business, public service, engineering and technology associate professionals? For example: data analysts, sales and marketing executives, project support officers, account managers (SOC Codes 31-35)
CustomField.label: FTE Post - No. Assoc Prof (Bus/Eng/Etc)
